name: round_half_down
spec: Round x to the nearest integer. On a tie (fractional part exactly .5), round toward negative infinity (down). Return an int.
para_spec: Return the closest integer to x; when x sits exactly halfway between two integers, choose the smaller (more negative) one.
contra_spec: Round x to the nearest integer; on a tie, round up toward positive infinity.

name: dedupe_keep_last
spec: Remove duplicates from xs, keeping only the LAST occurrence of each value. Order the result by the position of each value's last occurrence.
para_spec: Return xs with duplicates removed; for repeated values keep the final appearance, and order results by where those final appearances occur.
contra_spec: Remove duplicates from xs, keeping the FIRST occurrence of each value, preserving original order.

name: inclusive_range
signature: def inclusive_range(a: int, b: int) -> list:
spec: Return the list of integers from a to b inclusive. If a > b, the list descends from a down to b.
para_spec: Produce all integers between a and b, including both endpoints; when a is greater than b, count downward.
contra_spec: Return integers from a up to but not including b; if a > b return an empty list.

name: chunk_pad
signature: def chunk_pad(xs: list, n: int) -> list:
spec: Split xs into consecutive chunks of size n. Pad the final chunk with None up to length n if it is short.
para_spec: Break xs into groups of n elements each; if the last group is incomplete, fill it with None until it has n items.
contra_spec: Split xs into consecutive chunks of size n, discarding any leftover elements that do not fill a complete chunk.

name: truncate_ellipsis
signature: def truncate_ellipsis(s: str, n: int) -> str:
spec: If len(s) <= n return s unchanged. Otherwise return the first n-1 characters followed by a single ellipsis character '…', so the result has length exactly n.
para_spec: Return s when it fits in n characters; if it is longer, cut it so that appending one '…' makes the total length exactly n.
contra_spec: If s is longer than n characters, return the first n characters followed by '...' (three dots).

name: clamp_wrap
signature: def clamp_wrap(x: int, lo: int, hi: int) -> int:
spec: Wrap integer x into the inclusive range [lo, hi] cyclically using modulo, so values outside wrap around. The range size is hi - lo + 1.
para_spec: Map x into [lo, hi] by wrapping around with modular arithmetic instead of clamping; the interval includes both lo and hi.
contra_spec: Clamp x to [lo, hi]: return lo if x < lo, hi if x > hi, otherwise x.

name: first_unique_char
spec: Return the index of the first character in s that appears exactly once. If there is no such character, return -1.
para_spec: Find the position of the earliest character that occurs only a single time in s; return -1 when every character repeats.
contra_spec: Return the first character (as a one-character string) that appears exactly once in s, or '' if none.

name: running_max
spec: Return a list where the i-th element is the maximum of xs[0..i] (the running cumulative maximum).
para_spec: Produce the cumulative maxima of xs: each output element is the largest value seen so far up to that index.
contra_spec: Return the running cumulative sum of xs (each element is the sum of all elements up to that index).

name: count_words
spec: Count words in s. Words are separated by any run of whitespace (collapsing multiple). A hyphenated token like 'a-b' counts as a single word.
para_spec: Return the number of words in s, where any length of whitespace separates words and a hyphen joins parts into one word.
contra_spec: Count words by splitting s on single space characters only.

name: is_rotation
signature: def is_rotation(a: str, b: str) -> bool:
spec: Return True if b is a rotation of a (b equals some cyclic shift of a, i.e. moving a prefix of a to the end). Identical strings are rotations; two empty strings are rotations.
para_spec: Determine whether b is a rotated version of a, meaning some cyclic shift of a equals b; equal strings and two empty strings qualify.
contra_spec: Return True if b is an anagram of a (same characters in any order).

name: nth_largest_distinct
spec: Return the n-th largest DISTINCT value in xs (n is 1-indexed). If there are fewer than n distinct values, return None.
para_spec: Find the n-th biggest unique value in xs counting from 1; return None when xs has fewer than n distinct values.
contra_spec: Return the n-th largest value in xs counting duplicates (1-indexed), or None if xs has fewer than n elements.

name: normalize_path
spec: Normalize an absolute Unix path: collapse repeated slashes, resolve '.' (current) and '..' (parent) segments, keep the leading '/', and remove any trailing slash except for the root '/'.
para_spec: Clean an absolute Unix-style path by merging duplicate slashes, applying '.' and '..', preserving the initial '/', and dropping a trailing slash unless the whole path is just '/'.
contra_spec: Normalize the path by collapsing repeated slashes only; leave '.' and '..' segments untouched.
